CREATE TABLE keywords (id INT PRIMARY KEY, keyword VARCHAR(255));
SELECT get_keyword_ucase('HELLO') FROM keywords WHERE id = 1;
SELECT get_keyword_ucase('WORLD') FROM keywords WHERE id = 2;
SELECT get_keyword_ucase('test') FROM keywords WHERE id = 3;
SELECT get_keyword_ucase('VIRTUOSO') FROM keywords WHERE id = 4;
SELECT get_keyword_ucase('nonexistent') FROM keywords WHERE id = 5;
SELECT k1.keyword FROM keywords k1 JOIN keywords k2 ON get_keyword_ucase(k1.keyword) = get_keyword_ucase(k2.keyword) WHERE k2.id = 2;
SELECT k.keyword FROM (SELECT * FROM keywords WHERE get_keyword_ucase(keyword) = 'hello') AS k;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM keywords WHERE get_keyword_ucase(keyword) IN ('tEsT', 'VIRTUOSO');
SELECT get_keyword_ucase('T') FROM (SELECT keyword FROM keywords WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM keywords WHERE keyword LIKE '%o%')) AS subquery;
SELECT get_keyword_ucase('ANOTHER') FROM keywords WHERE id = 5;
SELECT k.keyword, get_keyword_ucase(k.keyword) FROM keywords k WHERE get_keyword_ucase(k.keyword) = get_keyword_ucase('EXAMPLE') AND k.id = 6;
